home.description: Helping businesses grow through strategic consulting — renewable energy, business development, IT & digital transformation, HR & operations, sales & project management, and financial solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Meet Ary Wibowo — a professional consultant with 10+ years in business, HR, and IT. Based in Jakarta, Indonesia.

services.title: Consulting Services
services.description: Digital business expansion, Integrated HR Management, and operational support integration — Ary Wibowo's consulting solutions for PERADA GROUP and corporate clients.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: Contact Ary Wibowo for business, HR, and IT consulting. Send a message via the form or email aku@arywibowo.id — Jakarta, Indonesia.

projects.title: Projects & Portfolio
projects.description: Strategic collaboration between Ary Wibowo and PERADA GROUP — from Integrated HR Management concepts, business digitalization, to integrated logistics & HR solutions for corporate clients.

hero.name: Ary Wibowo
hero.title: Professional Consultant
hero.tagline: Helping businesses grow through <highlight>Strategic Consulting</highlight> — <highlight>Renewable Energy</highlight>, <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>IT & Digital Transformation</highlight>, <highlight>HR & Operations</highlight>, <highlight>Sales & Project Management</highlight>, and <highlight>Financial Solutions</highlight>.

about.title: Professional Profile
about.summary: A blend of <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>Client Relations</highlight>, and <highlight>Technology Expertise</highlight> for impactful business solutions.
bio: Professional consultant with over 10 years of experience in <highlight>business</highlight>, <highlight>HR</highlight>, and <highlight>IT</highlight> — spanning <highlight>Business Development</highlight>, <highlight>client relations</highlight>, <highlight>renewable energy</highlight>, and <highlight>digital transformation</highlight>. A computer engineering background strengthens an analytical approach to designing <highlight>measurable business solutions</highlight> — from <highlight>market growth strategy</highlight> to <highlight>digital system implementation</highlight>.

Experienced in leading cross-industry projects in telecommunications and energy, coordinating <highlight>multidisciplinary teams</highlight>, and developing <highlight>digital platforms</highlight> for business process automation. Combines expertise in business development, HR, sales, project management, IT, and finance to deliver <highlight>integrated consulting</highlight> that creates real impact for organizations.
about.coreStrengthsDescription: Six key areas of expertise supporting integrated consulting.

services.title: Digital Expansion & Integrated HR
services.description: Supporting <highlight>digital business expansion</highlight> and <highlight>Integrated HR Management</highlight> at PERADA GROUP — connecting HR solutions with logistics & operational business support.
services.descriptionFull: <highlight>Professional consulting services</highlight> designed to support <highlight>digital business growth</highlight> and integrated operations at PERADA GROUP.
services.seeMoreRich: See full details on the <link>Services</link> page.
services.pageDescription: Integrated solutions for <highlight>digital business expansion</highlight> and <highlight>HR management</highlight> — from strategy to execution at PERADA GROUP.
services.positioningTitle: Ary's Role in PERADA GROUP's Digital Business Expansion
services.positioningDescription: Ary Wibowo plays a key role in <highlight>digital business expansion</highlight> and developing the <highlight>Integrated HR Management</highlight> concept at PERADA GROUP. His focus is on <highlight>integrating HR solutions</highlight> with logistics & business support services — giving corporate clients one cohesive, efficient partner ecosystem ready to scale.

digitalBusinessExpansion.title: Digital Business Expansion
digitalBusinessExpansion.usp: Opening <highlight>measurable digital growth</highlight> opportunities with real impact.
digitalBusinessExpansion.description: Guidance on <highlight>digital business expansion</highlight> strategy — from online brand positioning and digital platform development to integrating new business channels that support PERADA GROUP's growth and corporate clients.

integratedHrManagement.title: Integrated HR Management Solution
integratedHrManagement.usp: <highlight>Integrated HR solutions</highlight> within one service ecosystem.
integratedHrManagement.description: Developing the <highlight>Integrated HR Management</highlight> concept that connects human capital, outsourcing, and operational support — designed so corporate clients' HR needs are served within one PERADA GROUP service framework.

operationalBusinessSupport.title: Operational & Business Support Integration
operationalBusinessSupport.usp: Unifying <highlight>logistics, HR, and operational support</highlight> in one partner.
operationalBusinessSupport.description: Integration of <highlight>business operational services</highlight> — from freight forwarding & customs clearance (PT Perkasa Adi Yuda) to business support, events, facility management, and import solutions (PT Perdana Adi Yuda) — in one coordinated ecosystem.
features: Cross-division service integration at PERADA GROUP
Cost & time efficiency for corporate clients

contact.title: Let's Collaborate
contact.description: Have a project or want to discuss <highlight>business opportunities</highlight>? Send a message and I'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.responseNote: I usually respond within 24–48 hours. For urgent inquiries, please mention it in your message.

projects.title: Selected Projects

bespokeSolarEv.title: Strategic Partner — Solar Panel System & Battery for Electric Motorcycles in Indonesia
bespokeSolarEv.description: Strategic collaboration in developing and implementing <highlight>Solar Panel System + Battery Storage</highlight> for electric motorcycles in Indonesia. Ary Wibowo serves as a <highlight>strategic partner</highlight> in renewable energy business expansion, focusing on integrating <highlight>solar energy</highlight> with the electric vehicle ecosystem.
bespokeSolarEv.imageAlt: Bespoke Solar preview — solar panels and battery storage
highlights: Supporting clean energy transition in Indonesia
Solar energy integration with electric motorcycle ecosystem

superappsPerdana.title: Superapps Perdana Adi Yuda (End to End Recruitment & ERP)
superappsPerdana.description: A <highlight>Superapps platform</highlight> integrating <highlight>End-to-End Recruitment</highlight> and <highlight>ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning)</highlight> within PERADA GROUP. Ary Wibowo contributed to concept development and digital feature expansion to support operational needs and <highlight>Integrated HR Management</highlight>.
superappsPerdana.imageAlt: Superapps ePortal PT Perdana Adi Yuda preview
highlights: Centralized HR data integration in one platform
Supports PERADA GROUP's Integrated HR Management

integratedHrConcept.title: Integrated HR Management Concept Development
integratedHrConcept.description: Designing the <highlight>Integrated HR Management</highlight> concept that combines human capital, outsourcing, and PERADA GROUP's operational support into one unified service framework for corporate clients.

businessDigitalization.title: Business Process Digitalization Initiative
businessDigitalization.description: Supporting PERADA GROUP's <highlight>business process digitalization</highlight> — including digital presence and online platform development that strengthens positioning as a trusted logistics & HR partner.
highlights: Online platform for service information access

logisticsHrCollaboration.title: Logistics + HR Solution Collaboration for Corporate Clients
logisticsHrCollaboration.description: Orchestrating collaboration between <highlight>logistics & freight forwarding</highlight> (PT Perkasa Adi Yuda) and <highlight>business support & HR</highlight> (PT Perdana Adi Yuda) — delivering one partner for diverse corporate operational needs.
